title: Deployment Strategist
key_evidence: London role CONFIRMED via Ashby posting API (distinct from London/Stockholm Solutions Architect and SF roles).

JD is enterprise-delivery / forward-deployed-consulting: 'leading strategic customer engagements', 'driving adoption, organizational change, RENEWALS, and EXPANSION across Enterprise and Strategic accounts', QBRs, C-suite recommendations, embed-with-customer-teams.
This is squarely Ryan's STATED NON-FIT: community-led growth NOT enterprise B2B delivery; no enterprise account, implementation-delivery, renewals, or QBR experience on CV.

'Technical ability to collaborate with engineers to scope, prototype, deploy scalable solutions' + partner with Forward Deployed Engineers — leans more technical/delivery than Ryan's operator profile.

Lovable is one of the hottest AI companies in the world: $6.6B valuation, ~$400M ARR, exploding headcount (146 -> ~500-1000+ in 2026) => enormous applicant volume, very strong brand pull = lowest competition score.
Hypergrowth scale-up with dedicated recruiting => structured ATS/recruiter screen against enterprise-SaaS keywords Ryan lacks.

Partial positives: 'AI-native products create leverage across teams' framing echoes Ryan's AI-leverage thesis; comfort with ambiguity + fast execution + workshops/enablement (community/ambassador-programme adjacency) give a thin bridge.
biggest_lever: AI-leverage thesis + ambiguity-comfort + running enablement/ambassador-style programmes gives a thin narrative bridge to 'help customers rethink work with AI'.
biggest_risk: Core requirement is enterprise B2B deployment/renewals/expansion delivery — explicitly NOT Ryan's experience — at a hyper-famous brand with massive applicant volume and recruiter keyword screening.
recency_note: Posted ~117 days / 4 months ago (Ashby publishedAt 2026-02-12) — deeply stale -> G=10. Confirmed still live on careers page/LinkedIn but a months-old req at a flood-volume hype brand ($6.6B, ~$400M ARR) means a huge accumulated applicant backlog. Stale recency drops callback 35->25. No applicant count surfaced.
momentum_signals: FUNDING (POSITIVE): $330M Series B led by CapitalG + Menlo at $6.6B valuation (Dec 2025); $653M total over 4 rounds. Source: lovable.dev/blog/series-b, PitchBook 2026.

REVENUE/HEADCOUNT EXPLOSION (STRONG POSITIVE): ARR $100M (Jul 2025) -> $250M (EOY 2025) -> $400M (Feb 2026); headcount ~146 (Feb 2026) -> 1,069 by 2026-05-31. Among the fastest-scaling AI companies. Source: sacra, getpanto.ai, Tracxn 2026.

HIRING-INTENT (POSITIVE): publicly recruiting laid-off tech workers as a fast-paced big-tech alternative; expanded Google Cloud partnership 5x. Aggressive talent intake. Source: whatjobs.com, dealroom 2026.

TREATMENT CAVEAT: hyper-brand + this Deployment Strategist req live ~117 days = enormous accumulated backlog through structured ATS/recruiter screen. Company momentum is elite (green) but cold-applicant odds remain low on an enterprise-delivery req Ryan doesn't fit.
